restaurants.name: Taberna Azul
restaurants.description: A warm, blue-tiled tasca off Rua do Alecrim serving Atlantic seafood, daily catch and Portuguese classics.

restaurants.name: Le Petit Caveau
restaurants.description: A candlelit Parisian bistro pairing seasonal cooking with a deep natural-wine list.

restaurants.name: El Racó del Born
restaurants.description: A lively tapas bar in El Born with vermouth on tap and a daily seafood board.
